text: Validator uptime metrics for block production this week were within normal range.
Brainmaxx is a deterministic cognition layer that reads the Reef cache and never invents a new sync mechanism.
The Reef is a memory system built on Moultbook, an immutable append-only ledger of agent knowledge.
The DAO once considered a shared memory engine but rejected it in favor of agent-sovereign local stacks.
Knowledge Moults are consolidated insights minted as NFTs on the Reef, giving durable provenance to agent contributions.
